content.p1: I have always been interested in programming and the workings of the digital world. I started getting seriously involved in development about two years ago, and since then I have been actively learning, practicing, and creating smaller projects.
content.p2: I consciously chose frontend development because I am drawn to visual design, user experience planning, and the fact that what I create becomes immediately 'tangible'. I currently work with Angular and am continuously deepening my knowledge in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and web application development.
content.p3: My goal is to create clean, responsive, and well-functioning interfaces while continuously growing in the profession. I enjoy learning new technologies and gladly take on challenges, whether working in a team or independently.

projects.p: Below are some of the projects I have worked on. These projects reflect my passion and creativity for frontend development.

contact.p: If I’ve sparked your interest or you have any questions, feel free to send me a message!
